% No option in any category will ever be used more than once.
{C1=C2; D1=D2; P1=P2}=0 :- crater_info(C1,D1,P1), crater_info(C2,D2,P2), (C1,D1,P1)!=(C2,D2,P2).

% 1. The Garight crater is 150 meters wide.
D=150 :- crater_info(C,D,P), C="Garight".

% 2. The Cersay crater was formed during the Cambrian period.
P="Cambrian" :- crater_info(C,D,P), C="Cersay".
